blockingIssues.description: XcmInbox.receiveReceipt is permissionless, so any caller can spoof a receipt and permanently consume a correlationId before the real XCM delivery arrives.
LiquidationHookRegistry only stores one handler per hook type, so executeHooks cannot run multiple registered hooks in sequence as required by VAL-ASYNC-002.
correlateEvents greedily matches the first in-tolerance notification for a borrower, which can mispair repeated same-borrower liquidations across nearby blocks instead of the exact/closest block.

README market-creation instructions point to deploy:governed:testnet instead of incremental market-version deployment and document the wrong migrateBorrower call shape while omitting required coordinator permission wiring.

appliedUpdates.description: Added migration constraints, async receipt authentication guidance, and deployment-artifact quirks to .factory/library/architecture.md.
Added environment notes about explicit balance-check address arguments and EMERGENCY role cleanup when role-specific keys differ from the deployer.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow scoped validator reductions for docs-only, lint-only, and TS-only features, and require workers to record a deviation whenever compile/full-suite steps are intentionally skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: market-factory-docs used lint-only per mission guidance, event-correlator skipped hardhat compile for a TS-only script, and lint-fix-m10 only needed lint; all three handoffs still marked followedProcedure=true against broader skill requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep feature scopes aligned to worker boundaries by splitting live testnet deployment/wiring from Solidity implementation features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: liquidation-hook-registry assigned deployment of the registry/hook to a solidity-worker even though the active skill says live deployment belongs to deployment-worker, and the worker deferred that part.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the balance-check example to show the required address argument and call out that liveV2Smoke step 4 uses liquidationTxHash instead of txHash.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: gas-benchmarks first hit a usage error with bare check-testnet-balance invocation and had to special-case step4_liquidation.liquidationTxHash after the initial benchmark run reported N/A for liquidation gas.

rejectedObservations.observation: features.json still describes the emergency-admin transfer as a 2-TX grantRole+revokeRole flow.
rejectedObservations.reason: Historical mission metadata rather than operational shared state; not a services/library/skill target for this validator pass.

rejectedObservations.observation: The canonical manifest generatedAt timestamp was not refreshed after the emergency-admin update.
rejectedObservations.reason: A localized artifact hygiene issue, not a broader shared-state rule or knowledge gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeat observations that solidity-worker/docs-worker validation rules are too rigid for narrow features.
rejectedObservations.reason: Deduplicated into a single systemic skill-guidance recommendation above.
